result.reason: Duplicating an SSH connection with jump mode enabled is failing, indicating an issue with how connection properties, particularly jump host settings, are handled during the cloning process.
result.approach: Investigate `ConnectionInfo.Clone()` to ensure all SSH-specific properties, especially those related to jump hosts or any tunneling configuration, are correctly copied during duplication. The fix will likely involve ensuring proper copying of these specific SSH jump-related properties.
